props.name: _formFields
props.desc: Internal field list generated by the form builder.

props.name: allStyles
props.desc: Compiled style object from all breakpoint style configurations.

props.name: autoHeight
props.desc: Automatically grow the component height to fit content.

props.name: autoWidth
props.desc: Automatically grow the component width to fit content.

props.name: background
props.desc: Background style configuration (color, image, gradient).

props.name: backgroundBase64
props.desc: Base64-encoded background image data.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.desc: CSS background color (legacy - use background config instead).

props.name: backgroundCover
props.desc: How the background image covers the container ('contain' or 'cover').

props.name: backgroundDataSource
props.desc: Source of the background image: 'storedFileId', 'base64', or 'url'.

props.name: backgroundPosition
props.desc: CSS background-position value (e.g. 'center', 'top left').

props.name: backgroundRepeat
props.desc: CSS background-repeat value.

props.name: backgroundStoredFileId
props.desc: GUID of the stored file used as the background image.

props.name: backgroundType
props.desc: Whether the background is a 'color' or 'image'.

props.name: backgroundUrl
props.desc: URL of the background image.

props.name: block
props.desc: Stretch the component to fill the full width of its container.

props.name: border
props.desc: Border style configuration.

props.name: borderColor
props.desc: CSS border color (legacy - use border config instead).

props.name: borderRadius
props.desc: Border radius in pixels (legacy - use border config instead).

props.name: borderSize
props.desc: Border width in pixels (legacy - use border config instead).

props.name: borderStyle
props.desc: CSS border-style value (legacy - use border config instead).

props.name: borderType
props.desc: Border type override.

props.name: borderWidth
props.desc: Border width override.

props.name: className
props.desc: Additional CSS class names applied to the component wrapper.

props.name: color
props.desc: CSS text color (legacy - use font config instead).

props.name: componentName
props.desc: Internal component identifier used for state and context lookup.

props.name: components
props.desc: Nested child component definitions.

props.name: context
props.desc: Data context name this component subscribes to.

props.name: customEnabled
props.desc: Return true to enable the component, false to disable it.

props.name: customVisibility
props.desc: Return true to show the component, false to hide it.

props.name: defaultValue
props.desc: Default value applied when the form is first loaded.

props.name: description
props.desc: Internal description or notes visible only in the form builder.

props.name: desktop
props.desc: Style configuration applied on desktop breakpoints.

props.name: dimensions
props.desc: Dimension configuration (width, height, min/max).

props.name: editMode
props.desc: Controls whether the component is editable: 'editable', 'readOnly', or 'inherited'.

props.name: enableStyleOnReadonly
props.desc: Apply the configured styles even when the component is read-only.

props.name: font
props.desc: Font style configuration.

props.name: fontColor
props.desc: CSS font color (legacy - use font config instead).

props.name: fontSize
props.desc: Font size in pixels (legacy - use font config instead).

props.name: fontWeight
props.desc: CSS font-weight value (legacy - use font config instead).

props.name: height
props.desc: Component height (legacy - use dimensions config instead).

props.name: hidden
props.desc: Hide the component from view.

props.name: hideBorder
props.desc: Remove the component border.

props.name: hideLabel
props.desc: Hide the field label.

props.name: hideScrollBar
props.desc: Hide the scrollbar when content overflows.

props.name: id
props.desc: Unique component identifier (GUID).

props.name: initialContext
props.desc: Initial data context values injected on form load.

props.name: injectedDefaultValue
props.desc: Default value injected by the form engine at runtime.

props.name: injectedTableRow
props.desc: Row data injected when the component lives inside a datatable.

props.name: inputStyles
props.desc: Input element style configuration.

props.name: isDynamic
props.desc: Resolve component configuration dynamically at runtime.

props.name: jsSetting
props.desc: JavaScript expression overriding the component's setting value.

props.name: label
props.desc: Display label shown next to the input field.

props.name: labelAlign
props.desc: Alignment of the label text: 'left' or 'right'.

props.name: layout
props.desc: Form item layout: 'horizontal' or 'vertical'.

props.name: listType
props.desc: Display style for list items: 'text' or 'thumbnail'.

props.name: menuItemShadow
props.desc: Box shadow applied to menu items.

props.name: mobile
props.desc: Style configuration applied on mobile breakpoints.

props.name: noDataIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name shown in the empty-state placeholder.

props.name: noDataSecondaryText
props.desc: Secondary message shown below the no-data icon.

props.name: noDataText
props.desc: Primary message shown when the component has no data.

props.name: noLabelAutoMargin
props.desc: Disable the automatic left margin added when no label is shown.

props.name: onBlurCustom
props.desc: Called when the field loses focus.

props.name: onChangeCustom
props.desc: Called when the field value changes. value holds the new value.

props.name: onClickCustom
props.desc: Called when the component is clicked.

props.name: onFocusCustom
props.desc: Called when the field gains focus.

props.name: onSelectCustom
props.desc: Called when an option is selected.

props.name: overflow
props.desc: CSS overflow behavior.

props.name: parentId
props.desc: ID of the parent component in the form tree.

props.name: permissions
props.desc: Permission strings required to view or interact with this component.

props.name: placeholder
props.desc: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.

props.name: primaryBgColor
props.desc: Primary background color used in themed components.

props.name: primaryTextColor
props.desc: Primary text color used in themed components.

props.name: propertyName
props.desc: The form data property this component is bound to.

props.name: queryParams
props.desc: Additional query parameters passed to the component data source.

props.name: readOnly
props.desc: Render the component in read-only mode.

props.name: secondaryBgColor
props.desc: Secondary background color used in themed components.

props.name: secondaryTextColor
props.desc: Secondary text color used in themed components.

props.name: settingsValidationErrors
props.desc: Validation errors reported against the component's settings.

props.name: shadow
props.desc: Box shadow style configuration.

props.name: size
props.desc: Component size preset: 'small', 'middle', or 'large'.

props.name: style
props.desc: Return a React CSSProperties object applied to the field wrapper.

props.name: stylingBox
props.desc: Return a styling configuration object for the component box.

props.name: subscribedEventNames
props.desc: List of event names this component listens to.

props.name: tablet
props.desc: Style configuration applied on tablet breakpoints.

props.name: tooltip
props.desc: Tooltip text shown when the user hovers over the component or its label.

props.name: type
props.desc: Component type identifier used by the form engine.

props.name: validate
props.desc: Validation rules applied to the field value.

props.name: version
props.desc: Migrator version number for this component configuration.

props.name: width
props.desc: Component width (legacy - use dimensions config instead).

props.name: wrapperStyle
props.desc: Return a React CSSProperties object applied to the outer wrapper.

props.name: customStyle
props.desc: Return a React CSSProperties object. Use camelCase keys and quoted string values.

props.name: access
props.desc: Access control configuration for this form.

props.name: colon
props.desc: Show a colon after each field label.

props.name: dataLoaderType
props.desc: Type of data loader used to populate the form.

props.name: dataLoadersSettings
props.desc: Configuration passed to the data loader.

props.name: dataSubmitterType
props.desc: Type of data submitter used when the form is saved.

props.name: dataSubmittersSettings
props.desc: Configuration passed to the data submitter.

props.name: deleteUrl
props.desc: API URL for DELETE requests.

props.name: excludeFormFieldsInPayload
props.desc: Exclude form field values from the submit payload.

props.name: fieldsToFetch
props.desc: Entity property names fetched when loading form data.

props.name: getUrl
props.desc: API URL for GET requests to load form data.

props.name: initialValues
props.desc: Default values applied when a new record form is opened.

props.name: isSettingsForm
props.desc: Mark this form as a settings form (disables some default behaviours).

props.name: labelCol
props.desc: Ant Design label column span (1-24) applied to all fields.

props.name: layout
props.desc: Form layout: 'horizontal' or 'vertical'.

props.name: modelType
props.desc: Fully-qualified entity type the form is bound to (e.g. 'Shesha.Core.Person').

props.name: onAfterDataLoad
props.desc: Called after form data has been fetched and set.

props.name: onBeforeDataLoad
props.desc: Called before form data is fetched.

props.name: onBeforeSubmit
props.desc: Called before the form submits. Must be async.

props.name: onDataLoaded
props.desc: Called after form data is loaded.

props.name: onInitialized
props.desc: Called once when the form is initialised.

props.name: onPrepareSubmitData
props.desc: Return the final payload object to submit. Must be async.

props.name: onSubmitFailed
props.desc: Called when form submission fails.

props.name: onSubmitSuccess
props.desc: Called after a successful form submission. Must be async.

props.name: onUpdate
props.desc: Called when the form updates.

props.name: onValuesUpdate
props.desc: Called when any field value changes.

props.name: permissions
props.desc: Permission strings required to access this form.

props.name: postUrl
props.desc: API URL for POST requests when creating a record.

props.name: preparedValues
props.desc: Return the prepared values object before display.

props.name: putUrl
props.desc: API URL for PUT requests when updating a record.

props.name: size
props.desc: Global size preset for all inputs: 'small', 'middle', or 'large'.

props.name: version
props.desc: Form schema version number.

props.name: wrapperCol
props.desc: Ant Design wrapper column span (1-24) applied to all fields.

action-config.desc: Configures an action to execute. Identified by _type: "action-config".

shape.name: _type
shape.desc: Discriminator — always "action-config".

shape.name: actionName
shape.desc: Name of the action to execute (e.g. "Submit", "Navigate", "Execute Script").

shape.name: actionOwner
shape.desc: Namespace/owner of the action (e.g. "shesha.form", "shesha.common").

shape.name: handleFail
shape.desc: When true, onFail contains the failure handler action.

shape.name: handleSuccess
shape.desc: When true, onSuccess contains the success handler action.

shape.name: onSuccess
shape.desc: Action to execute on success. Present when handleSuccess is true.

shape.name: onFail
shape.desc: Action to execute on failure. Present when handleFail is true.

shesha.form.desc: ownerUid is always shesha.form but owner (display name) is the form name.

componentActions.desc: Registered per component instance. Owner equals the component name property at runtime.

style-config.desc: Responsive style container for a breakpoint (desktop / mobile / tablet). May also contain component-specific visual props (e.g. buttonType on button).

shape.name: stylingBox
shape.desc: JSON string of additional inline styles.

shape.name: enableStyleOnReadonly
shape.desc: Apply styles even when the component is readonly.

shape.name: tag
shape.desc: Tag styling for dropdown and tag-mode components.

shape.name: border
shape.desc: { all, top, bottom, left, right } — each side: { width: string, style: string, color: string }.

shape.name: radius
shape.desc: { all: number } or { topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight } in px.

background-config.desc: Background configuration supporting color, image, and gradient.

shape.name: color
shape.desc: CSS color value. Used when type is "color".

shape.name: gradient
shape.desc: { direction: string, colors: object } for gradient backgrounds.

shape.name: url
shape.desc: URL for image backgrounds.

shape.name: storedFile
shape.desc: { id: string | null } reference to a stored file.

shape.name: uploadFile
shape.desc: Uploaded file object for image backgrounds.

shape.name: type
shape.desc: Font family name (e.g. "Segoe UI").

shape.name: size
shape.desc: Font size in px.

shape.name: weight
shape.desc: Font weight (e.g. "400", "700").

shape.name: color
shape.desc: CSS color value.

dimensions-config.desc: Width and height constraints — all values are CSS strings (e.g. "auto", "100px", "50%").

shape.name: offsetX
shape.desc: Horizontal shadow offset in px.

shape.name: offsetY
shape.desc: Vertical shadow offset in px.

shape.name: color
shape.desc: CSS color value.

shape.name: blurRadius
shape.desc: Blur radius in px.

shape.name: spreadRadius
shape.desc: Spread radius in px.

button-group-item.desc: An entry in a buttonGroup items array. itemType discriminates between a button ("item") and a dropdown group ("group").

shape.name: itemType
shape.desc: Discriminator: "item" = button/separator/dynamic; "group" = nested dropdown.

shape.name: icon
shape.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "SearchOutlined").

shape.name: itemSubType
shape.desc: Present when itemType is "item".

shape.name: actionConfiguration
shape.desc: Present when itemSubType is "button".

shape.name: dividerWidth
shape.desc: Present when itemSubType is "separator" or "line".

shape.name: dividerColor
shape.desc: Present when itemSubType is "separator" or "line".

shape.name: dynamicItemsConfiguration
shape.desc: Present when itemSubType is "dynamic".

shape.name: hideWhenEmpty
shape.desc: Present when itemType is "group".

shape.name: childItems
shape.desc: Nested items. Present when itemType is "group". Recursive.

tag-style.desc: Style configuration for dropdown tags — border, background, font, dimensions, shadow.

shape.name: stylingBox
shape.desc: JSON string of additional inline styles.

label-value-item.desc: A selectable option item (ILabelValue). Used by dropdown, checkboxGroup and radio items arrays.

shape.name: id
shape.desc: Unique identifier for the item.

shape.name: label
shape.desc: Display text shown to the user.

shape.name: value
shape.desc: The value stored on the form.

shape.name: color
shape.desc: CSS color for the tag/badge.

shape.name: icon
shape.desc: Ant Design icon name (e.g. "DownCircleOutlined").

shape.name: description
shape.desc: Optional description shown beneath the label.

shape.name: name
shape.desc: Fully qualified name of the reference list (e.g. "Boxfusion.Enums.Role").

shape.name: module
shape.desc: Module the reference list belongs to. Null for the current module.

form-id.desc: Identifies a Shesha form (FormIdentifier). Shape: { name, module }.

shape.name: name
shape.desc: Form name slug (e.g. "account-create-view").

shape.name: module
shape.desc: Module the form belongs to (e.g. "Boxfusion.SheshaFunctionalTests.Common").

entity-type-id.desc: Identifies an entity class by name and module (IEntityTypeIdentifier). Used where entityType is an object rather than a fully-qualified string.

shape.name: name
shape.desc: Entity class name (e.g. "Person", "Event").

shape.name: module
shape.desc: Module the entity belongs to (e.g. "Boxfusion.SheshaFunctionalTests.Common").

calendar-layer.desc: A calendar data layer defining an event source. dataSource discriminates 'entity' vs 'custom' (url) variants.

shape.name: id
shape.desc: Unique layer ID (GUID).

shape.name: name
shape.desc: Internal identifier for the layer.

shape.name: label
shape.desc: Display label shown in the layer switcher.

shape.name: allowChangeVisibility
shape.desc: Allow the user to toggle this layer's visibility.

shape.name: visible
shape.desc: Whether the layer is visible by default.

shape.name: dataSource
shape.desc: 'entity' fetches via entityType; 'custom' fetches via customUrl.

shape.name: entityType
shape.desc: Entity class identifier ({ name, module }) used when dataSource is 'entity'.

shape.name: title
shape.desc: Property name on the entity to use as the event title.

shape.name: startTime
shape.desc: Property name on the entity that holds the event start date/time.

shape.name: endTime
shape.desc: Property name on the entity that holds the event end date/time.

shape.name: customUrl
shape.desc: API URL to fetch events from (used when dataSource is 'custom').

modal-settings.desc: Configuration for the 'Add new record' modal in an entity picker (IAddNewRecordProps).

shape.name: modalFormId
shape.desc: Form to display inside the modal.

shape.name: modalTitle
shape.desc: Title shown in the modal header.

shape.name: showModalFooter
shape.desc: Show the modal footer bar.

shape.name: footerButtons
shape.desc: Which footer buttons to render.

shape.name: modalWidth
shape.desc: Modal width as pixels (number) or CSS string (e.g. '80%').

shape.name: buttons
shape.desc: Custom button definitions shown when footerButtons is 'custom'.

stored-filter.desc: A named saved filter shown in the table view selector.

shape.name: id
shape.desc: Unique filter ID (GUID).

shape.name: name
shape.desc: Display name shown in the selector.

shape.name: expression
shape.desc: JSON Logic or object filter expression.

shape.name: selected
shape.desc: Whether this filter is currently selected.

shape.name: defaultSelected
shape.desc: Whether this filter is selected by default.

shape.name: permissions
shape.desc: Permission strings required to see this filter.

column-item.desc: Defines a single column in a datatable or kanban view. Shared between table and kanban components.

shape.name: id
shape.desc: Unique column ID (GUID).

shape.name: itemType
shape.desc: Item type discriminator (e.g. 'item').

shape.name: caption
shape.desc: Column header label.

shape.name: minWidth
shape.desc: Minimum column width in pixels.

shape.name: columnType
shape.desc: Determines how the column value is sourced.

shape.name: isVisible
shape.desc: Whether the column is visible by default.

shape.name: propertyName
shape.desc: Entity property bound to this column.

shape.name: displayComponent
shape.desc: Component used to render the cell in read mode. Shape: { type: string }.

shape.name: editComponent
shape.desc: Component used to render the cell in edit mode. Shape: { type: string }.

shape.name: createComponent
shape.desc: Component used to render the cell in create mode. Shape: { type: string }.

shape.name: allowSorting
shape.desc: Allow the column to be sorted.

shape.name: permissions
shape.desc: Permission strings required to see this column.
